name: 3M™ Tamper Evident Label Material 7613, White Destructible Vinyl, Roll, Config
short_description: 3M™ Destructible Vinyl Label Materials 7613 is a consistent, smooth film designed to exhibit immediate destructibility on many surfaces with low shrinkage vinyl and high dimensional stability. This material utilizes 3M™ High Holding Acrylic Adhesive 350, it offers excellent chemical resistance and holding strength even at high temperatures.
benefits: Designed for a range of labeling applications where tamper-resistance is important
Facestocks designed for reliable use and processing
Acrylic adhesive is formulated for strength, tack and clarity on a variety of surfaces
Low shrinkage vinyl material that produces dimensionally stable labels
PK, PCK, glassine or super-calendered liners make for excellent die cutting and other processing

discovery.title: 3M™ Tamper Evident Label Material 7613, White Destructible Vinyl, Roll, Config
